welkom.tekst: Download an empty CSV template with the correct column names for MyFamTreeCollab. Fill in the template with your family data and then import it via the import page.
preview.subtitel: The first row shows column names in your language. The second row contains the technical names required for import — do not remove them.
status.succes: ✅ Template downloaded as {{naam}} — fill in the rows and import via the import page.
info.titel: Tips for filling in the template
info.tip1: Do not remove the first two rows (column names) — the import needs them.
info.tip3: For Gender use: M (male), F (female) or X (other).
info.tip4: Separate multiple partners in PartnerID with a | (pipe).
info.tip5: Save the file as .csv from Excel via "Save as → CSV".
